response.justification: The candidate has only ~6 months of professional C++ exposure (National Instruments, 2014–2015) and a university thesis using C++, which falls far short of the 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows required. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience listed (MongoDB and generic SQL/MySQL only), and no Fixed Income, Investment Banking, or Capital Markets domain background. The profile is strong in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/full-stack work, which is misaligned with this role.
strengths: Strong general software engineering background with TDD, CI/CD, and craftsmanship practices
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops, talks, and teaching
Polyglot experience including some C/C++ at National Instruments and exposure to scripting
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience — roughly 6 months professionally vs. 5–10 years required, and no Windows C++ focus
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain exposure
